title: Vera Bradley (VRA) Surpasses Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: Vera Bradley reported Q3 2020 earnings of $0.30 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.23 per share by a significant margin. Prior year Q3 2020 EPS was $0.20 per share, indicating strong year-over-year earnings growth. This beat demonstrated continued strong execution during the pandemic period with robust consumer demand for the company's products.
